mcte-About the Department

Kadir Has University Mechatronics Engineering Undergraduate Program

focuses on sensor technologies, robotics, and automation, which have gained significant importance today and need a synergetic combination of machinery, electronics, and software.

By providing world-class quality education with a

Project-Based Education

approach, the program aims to train engineers who

Are equipped with universal values and competencies,

Able to deal with all kinds of engineering problems with courage, bring solutions with multi-disciplinary and project-based approaches,

Have acquired the necessary software, hardware, and design infrastructure for mechatronics engineering,

Can take roles in research and development, design, project development, and management in robotics, automation, sensor technologies, and similar subjects.

All mechatronics engineering programs in Turkey and abroad are structured as separate courses, most of which are compulsory. Our Mechatronics Engineering Department is based on

Transfer of universal values and competencies to the student starting from the first semester,

Starting from the second semester, studies for academic and professional competencies,

A project-based education model which spans four years.

The courses are handled through projects based on examples of mechatronics engineering applications to be determined in cooperation with the industry. Starting from the 2nd term, the student has at least two projects each term, questions the formation required to reach the goal in these projects, and acquires it with the subjects to be learned in that semester. The industrial stakeholders of the program play an active role in the definition, execution, evaluation, and grading of these projects. As a result, our program is an innovative program designed to provide mechatronics engineering education with a project-oriented education model for the students equipped with universal values and competencies.

The education of the Mechatronics Engineering Department is in English.
